# Suddeco

> Suddeco is an AI estimating and design platform for UK building contractors. Upload architect drawings and Suddeco produces a measured, priced, contractor-signed scope of works — and photoreal room and elevation designs generated directly from that priced scope.

Suddeco turns drawings into money in one connected workspace. The same project flows end to end: measure the drawings, generate a priced scope of works (areas → stages → tasks → materials with live labour and material costs), and design every room and elevation from that exact priced scope. A property and site intelligence layer adds appraisal, feasibility and risk. Built for non-technical builders — fast and voice-friendly across web, desktop and mobile. The render doubles as a measured, priced, signed scope of works — no competitor ties design to a live priced takeoff this way.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://www.suddeco.com/): What Suddeco does and who it is for.
- [About](https://www.suddeco.com/about): The company and mission.
- [Blog](https://www.suddeco.com/blog): Guides on construction estimating, NRM1, digital transformation and running a building business.

## What Suddeco does
- TakeOff: measure architect drawings, detect scale, extract rooms and areas.
- Scope of Works: a priced scope — areas, stages, tasks and materials with live labour and material costs, margins and a signed client pack.
- Design Studio: photoreal room renders and building elevations generated from the priced scope, with two-way chat to change materials and re-price instantly.
- Intelligence: property and site appraisal, feasibility, EPC insight and comparables.

## App
- [Suddeco app](https://my.suddeco.com): Sign in to create projects, run takeoffs, generate priced scopes and design rooms.
